project.name: SylphxAI GitHub Organization Configuration
project.summary: Organization-level GitHub configuration, community health files, reusable workflows, workflow templates, shared GitHub Actions, brand references, and repository bootstrap templates.

surfaces.name: Community health files
surfaces.description: Organization-wide code of conduct, contributing, security, issue, and pull-request templates.

surfaces.name: ADR-29 reusable admission workflow
surfaces.description: Reusable admission workflow consumed by SylphxAI repositories.

surfaces.name: Release reusable workflow
surfaces.description: Reusable release workflow for package release automation.

surfaces.name: Publish to NPM reusable workflow
surfaces.description: Reusable npm publish workflow with Changesets integration.

surfaces.name: ADR-29 admission composite action
surfaces.description: Shared composite action implementing ADR-29 admission logic.

surfaces.name: Changesets publisher setup action
surfaces.description: Installs the manager-aware Changesets publisher used by release workflows.

surfaces.name: Local project-control validation
surfaces.description: Repository-local syntax validation for shared actions.

surfaces.name: Repository entry point
surfaces.description: Start-here guide linking human and machine project-control surfaces.

surfaces.name: Project definition
surfaces.description: Human project identity, lifecycle, boundary, delivery, and validation entry point.

commands.name: check:changesets-publisher
commands.purpose: Syntax-check the manager-aware Changesets publisher without mutating release state.

commands.name: lint:github-actions
commands.purpose: Validate every organization workflow, including target required-workflow syntax and immutable action references.

adoption.notes: Local identity only. Static instructions and admission belong to SylphxAI/skills; live repository ingestion belongs to Sylphx Enact.
